title: Memory Items
description: Turn your items into living memories.
body:
# 🌟 Memory Items

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a395bd0f5094c08d22ec9d766b7e6bf48d6ba8.png)

**Author:** Seishiro Nagi  
**Minecraft Version:** 1.20.1  
**Mod Type:** Forge  


Every special item remembers **who created it** and **the exact real-world date** when it was made — without constantly updating or changing its data.  
Once created, the memory stays **stable, authentic, and permanent**.

---

## ✨ Features

- 📅 **Real creation date**  
  Each memory item stores the real date when it was crafted or created.

- 👤 **Creator information**  
  The item remembers **who created it**, even if it changes owners later.

- 🧩 **No dynamic age system**  
  The item does **not** track how much time has passed since creation, avoiding unnecessary updates.

- ⚙️ **Stable NBT data**  
  NBT data is written **once** and never updated again, preventing:
  - constant hand re-equip animations  
  - visual glitches  
  - performance issues

- 🎮 **Vanilla-friendly**  
  Works seamlessly with vanilla gameplay and other mods.

---

## 📖 Example Lore

> *Created by:* **PlayerName**  
> *Creation date:* **MM DD, YYYY · HH:MM**

Simple. Clean. Meaningful.

---

## 🌱 Perfect for

- Roleplay servers  
- Story-driven worlds  
- SMPs with history and legacy  
- Players who love meaningful details

---

## 📦 Compatibility

- Minecraft: **1.20.1+**
- Mod Loader:  **Forge**
  
---
